Synkie turns any webpage into a live chat room.
Instantly connect with people who are viewing the same page as you — no accounts, invites, or setup required. Chat in real time, share reactions, or leave comments that future visitors can see. Synkie adds a social layer to the web, making every page a place for conversation.

Features:
Instantly chat with people on the same webpage
No signup required — works automatically
Send messages, emojis, images, files, and voice notes
Leave persistent comments for future visitors
Reply in threaded discussions
Discover trending pages with active chats
Floating chat bubble for quick access on any site

The Time Champ Chromebook Tracker is a browser extension designed to monitor user interactions by tracking mouse clicks and visited web pages. This extension is a key component of the Time Champ system, helping to gather metrics for productivity analysis. It operates silently in the background, capturing click events and recording the URLs of web pages accessed by users. The data collected is then sent to the Time Champ server for real-time insights and reporting, enabling administrators to monitor web activity, ensure compliance, and optimize workflows.

Translate words and add them to your dictionary

Absolutely, here's a simplified version:

Introducing our new Chrome extension that makes translating words while browsing the web super easy!

Here's what it does:

Set Up: First, just give the extension permission to work. It's a one-time thing.

Translate on the Go: Whenever you're on a website, highlight any word you want to translate and keep mouse down. Our extension will quickly give you the meaning, considering how the word is used in that sentence.

See Instant Results: You'll see the translation right there on the screen, so you can keep reading without interruption.

Easy to Use: It's really simple to use and fits right into your browsing routine.

Learn as You Go: Plus, every word you translate gets saved for later on choodic.com. It's like building your own vocabulary list without even trying!

Get our Chrome extension now and make browsing in different languages a breeze!

Short Description:
Send targeted notifications to Yotpo employees across iOS and Windows devices with dynamic content support.
Full…

Short Description:
Send targeted notifications to Yotpo employees across iOS and Windows devices with dynamic content support.
Full Description:
The Yotpo Notification Manager is an essential tool for internal communication, allowing administrators to push notifications directly to employees' devices, whether on iOS or Windows. The extension supports various content types, including text, images, gifs, and sounds, ensuring messages are engaging and effective.
Key Features:
Admin Management: Manage all notification parameters through a stand-alone page integrated into Yotpo's internal portal- decide on size, time and what will be displayed. 
Targeted Notifications: Segment your messages by user attributes like geo-location, department, and team.
Rich Content Support: Include rich text, gifs, and even HTML and JavaScript in your notifications.
Cross-Platform Compatibility: Ensure notifications are received on both iOS and Windows devices, even when browsers are closed.
Security: Only Yotpo employees with proper authorization can create and modify notifications, ensuring data integrity and security.

The extension is meant to display notification Items on the user’s chrome page.
Dev Language – Javascript (React + Typescript).

Data for each notification is retrieved from a Firebase database via GCloud Node.js API, where each notification has its own configuration and properties.
When the notification is displayed the user then can close it via a X button on the corner of the notification.

The extension decides on whether to show a notification based on Date range & sometimes specific audiences (per chrome login email).

Each displayed notification’s data is saved on to localstorage to make sure it doesn’t appear again if not needed (unless its’ configuration was somehow changed\updated in the database).

The extension listens for changes made by the Node.js API via Websocket.

The extension reaches for a GCloud Node.js API written by us as well.
The data retrieved is all the notifications’ configuration “records” in the DB.
Example for a configuration JSON object:
{
      "active": false,
      "configurationName": "Yaki-test-1",
      "height": 500,
      "htmlUrl": "https://notification-example-balloons.web.app/",
      "isHTMLCSSOnly": false,
      "lastModified": "Mon Jul 01 2024 | 15:04:51 GMT+0300 (Israel Daylight Time)",
      "lastModifiedBy": "test@example.com",
      "position": {
        "positionX": "left",
        "positionY": "top"
      },
      "schedule": {
        "from": "Sun Jun 30 2024 00:30:00 GMT+0300 (Israel Daylight Time)",
        "to": "Sun Jun 30 2024 12:00:00 GMT+0300 (Israel Daylight Time)"
      },
      "width": 400
}

The extension reaches for logged in user data on Chrome itself, mainly the user’s email to log it onto the DB and also to ensure the user should see this notification, if a specific target audience was defined.
The log is also written in the user’s LocalStorage for future reference.
Example of Log JSON object:
{
      "configurationId": "-O0Tp25wGnV18JlHtyAv",
      "configurationName": "mytest1",
      "lastTimestamp": "2024-06-28T12:32:55.595Z",
      "userEmail": "test.mytest@test.com"
}
Add your website pages to Google's index slower than you ever thought possible.

Terrapin Indexer is a SEO tool that lets you batch add URLs to Google's Website Search Console. Once added, they are added to a priority queue by Google, and within a day or two will be shown in the Search Engine Result Pages. This will allow you to receive organic traffic for those pages.

The daily quota set by Google is around 6-10 URLs per day, which is around 2200 URLs per year. With Terrapin you can create a list of your most valuable or recently updated URLs once. Then Terrapin will slowly and steadily work through the URL list adding them to Google daily over many months.

Terrapin runs in the background on your Chrome browser and lets you use your Google daily indexing quota without having to add the URLs by hand one by one. It can save you half an hour a day (15 hours per month).

Your site and URLs are not shared with Terrapin and remain private. Only the number of indexed URLs are logged.

You can export indexed URLs via CSV.
Connect with your customers and grow your business with WhatsApp enhancement tool

WhatsApp Sender helps you send messages to a list of contacts one-by-one with a human-like delay — directly inside WhatsApp Web.
Perfect for freelancers, agents, and businesses who want to save time while staying safe.

Key Features

Send Messages One-by-One
Add a list of numbers and the extension automatically opens each chat and sends your message.

Custom Delay Between Messages
Choose a delay (1–5 seconds) to imitate natural human typing and reduce the risk of getting rate-limited.

Privacy Safe
All actions run locally in your browser. No data is collected, stored, or sent to any server.

Anti-Ban Focused
The tool uses human-like interaction (open chat → wait → send), but it does not guarantee account safety.
You stay fully in control.

Easy to Use
Just upload your number list, write your message, and click Start.
Inker is an intuitive yet developmental tool to aid web readers with the facility to highlight texts in the web page and also save…

Inker is an intuitive yet developmental tool to aid web readers with the facility to highlight texts in the web page and also save them in the google docs for future reference. Things get interesting with various color and highlighting customization that inker offers. Give it a try !

Need to resume reading a webpage after a break, Do not  worry! we have got u covered. Inker keeps the highlighted text in a webpage until u do not need it. Thus, making web reading a breeze! 
Just ensure that you always use inker in full screen window to achieve best results.

Still in development! Do not engage.
Shows profile identity overlay during Mission Control and App Exposé

Mac users with multiple Chrome profiles rejoice! No longer do you have to squint at Chrome windows in Mission Control or App Exposé to figure out which profile is which. Install this Chrome Extension and the tiny Mac App at https://github.com/jaygoldman/chrome-profile-beacon, and you'll get a clear overlay on each window in Mission Control and App Exposé. The overlay shows each profile's color, avatar, and name.

Floating crypto ticker: Real-time prices for major cryptocurrencies. Custom watchlist, price alerts, multilingual UI.

Crypto Dashboard — Floating Crypto Ticker & Pro Features
Crypto Dashboard is a lightweight Chrome extension that lets you instantly view real-time prices of major cryptocurrencies anywhere on the web.
Easily customize your watchlist, get price alerts, and unlock advanced features with a simple upgrade.
Key Features
Floating crypto ticker: Always on top, never in the way
Real-time prices for 100+ major coins
Customizable watchlist, multi-language UI
One-click Google login and Pro upgrade
Secure, privacy-friendly, no account required
How to Use
Install the extension and pin it to your Chrome toolbar.
Click the floating ball on any webpage to open your crypto dashboard.
Add your favorite coins to your watchlist.
Sign in with Google (optional) to sync your Pro status and settings.
Upgrade to Pro for unlimited watchlist and advanced features — just click the “Upgrade” button and follow the payment instructions.
Start tracking the crypto market in real time, right from your browser!

"StackForGeeks" is a Chrome extension that helps you save important information you copy from any website. When you save something, you can add a search term to it. Later, when you search using that term, the extension will show you what you saved before. It's like a personal note-taking tool that helps you quickly find answers based on what you've copied in the past.

Translate, markup and learn new words while browsing.

Simple Vocabulary is a lightweight and intuitive tool designed to help you learn new words from any website you visit. Whether you're reading articles, studying, or browsing casually, you can save unfamiliar words in seconds and build your personal vocabulary list.

⭐ How it works

Just press CTRL + Double-Click on any word to save it.
(On Mac: CMD + Double-Click)

Simple, fast, and distraction-free.

⭐ Features

Mark words instantly from any website

Automatically saves your vocabulary in the cloud

Training mode to review and memorize words

Works with multiple languages

Clean, minimal, and user-friendly interface

Syncs across devices using your Chrome account

Privacy-friendly: your data is yours

⭐ Perfect for

Language learners

Students

Professionals improving their vocabulary

Anyone who regularly reads in another language

⭐ Why Simple Vocabulary?

Instead of switching to translation apps or writing notes manually, Simple Vocabulary lets you collect words naturally while browsing the web. It makes learning a continuous and effortless habit.

Your Sales Assistant for Personalised Outreach

Keats AI is an advanced AI assistant designed for sales executives and teams, streamlining daily tasks such as client data collection, creating hyper-personalized outreach campaigns, and automating routine actions. Our solution empowers sales professionals to close deals faster and consistently hit their revenue goals.

Keats AI adapts and evolves by learning from your unique sales interactions, crafting personalized strategies for each client. It captures how you conduct research, pitch, engage with clients, and handle daily tasks like setting reminders or booking meetings. Using this knowledge, Keats AI creates your "digital twin"—a virtual assistant that seamlessly handles your responsibilities, from identifying ideal clients and conducting research to drafting personalized communication, building sales presentations, and scheduling meetings.

Our first feature enables you to create tailored emails for every client, based on their company’s background, value proposition, and specific pain points. We aggregate data from multiple sources, including websites, LinkedIn profiles, news articles, and blogs, to generate a pitch designed to secure meetings.
